# OpsChain
> Enterprise operations automation and governance platform by LimePoint

OpsChain is a change management and orchestration platform for enterprise DevOps,
infrastructure, and platform engineering teams. It provides autonomous AI agents,
governed intelligence, unified workflow orchestration, and compliance-ready
audit trails.

## What OpsChain Does

OpsChain automates infrastructure change management with AI-powered agents,
governed workflows, and end-to-end audit trails. It unifies tools, teams,
and processes under a single governed automation layer — so every change is
safe, compliant, and traceable.

## Target Personas

- Platform Engineering Leaders
- DevOps and SRE Teams
- CISOs and Compliance Officers
- CIOs and CTOs in regulated industries
- IT Operations Managers

## Key Capabilities

- Autonomous Agents: 24x7 AI-powered operations teammates
- Governed Intelligence: Policy-enforced, auditable AI automation
- Unified Workflow Orchestration: Single control plane across cloud, on-prem, hybrid
- Pluggable Automation: Tool-agnostic framework (Terraform, Ansible, custom scripts)
- Security & Compliance: Enterprise-grade vault integration, immutable audit trails
- Real-Time Observability: Full visibility with self-healing capabilities
- Analytics: Operational insights and continuous improvement metrics

## Industry Solutions

- Utilities & Energy: NERC CIP, IEC 62443 compliance
- Banking & Financial Services: PCI-DSS, APRA CPS 234 alignment
- Telecommunications: Network change governance for 5G, IMS

## Company

OpsChain is built by LimePoint Pty Ltd, an Australian company.
Website: https://limepoint.com
